2143990.name: Fantasy Grounds - Devin Night Token Pack 161: Coastal Creatures
2143990.description:
Devin Night Token Pack 161: Coastal Creatures

Coastal Calamity! Fierce foes have been spotted making landfall in your campaign! 34 Aquatic attackers have arrived, Slothful Snailmen supported by scaly Selkies and fearsome Fishfolk Warriors are only the beginning! Bring this briny pack home today and unleash coastal conquest!

  • FishFolk Leader
  • FishFolk shaman
  • FishFolk warrior

  • Triton Man

Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: James Holloway
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
